name: Cowboy Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the beans and 4 cups of water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Cover and let stand for 1 hour (or soak overnight).
4. Drain and rinse the beans.
5. In the same pan, combine the beans with 4 cups of fresh water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for about 75 minutes or until the beans are tender, stirring occasionally.
7. Drain the beans, reserving the liquid.
8. In a 2-pint casserole, combine the beans, ham, and onion.
9. Stir together half a cup of the bean liquid, passata, chili peppers, brown sugar, chili powder, salt, and mustard.
10. Stir into the bean mixture.
11. Bake, covered, in a 160°C/325°F/Gas Mark 3 oven for about an hour.
12. Uncover and bake for about 45 minutes or more to the desired consistency.
